entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for yield losses caused by C. hermanniae in Nigeria

entities.name: CORYNA HERMANNIAE
entities.description: A beetle species (Coleoptera: Meloidae) that acts as a pest to pearl millet

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the field trials were conducted

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The region where C. hermanniae is identified as a potentially serious pest

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which decreased significantly with increased beetle infestation

entities.name: PANICLE WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the panicle at maturity, which declined due to beetle infestation

entities.name: FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: The experimental method used to determine grain yield losses

entities.name: HEAD CAGES
entities.description: The tool used to artificially infest pearl millet panicles with beetles

entities.name: FREE-CHOICE AND NO-CHOICE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The experimental conditions under which the impact of C. hermanniae was tested

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity resulting from pest infestation
